findings.title: Buttons do not have an accessible name
findings.description: When a button doesn't have an accessible name, screen readers announce it as "button", making it unusable for users who rely on screen readers. [Learn how to make buttons more accessible](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/button-name).
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: Touch targets do not have sufficient size or spacing.
findings.description: Touch targets with sufficient size and spacing help users who may have difficulty targeting small controls to activate the targets. [Learn more about touch targets](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/target-size).
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: Botoes devem ter texto identificavel.
findings.description: Garanta buttons have discernible text. Ajuda: Botoes devem ter texto identificavel.
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: Alternative text of images deve not be repeated as text
findings.description: Garanta image alternative is not repeated as text. Ajuda: Alternative text of images deve not be repeated as text
findings.recommendation: Forneça texto alternativo significativo para imagens informativas.

findings.title: Banner landmark deve not be contained in another landmark
findings.description: Garanta the banner landmark is at top level. Ajuda: Banner landmark deve not be contained in another landmark
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: Document deve not have more than one banner landmark
findings.description: Garanta the document has at most one banner landmark. Ajuda: Document deve not have more than one banner landmark
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: landmarks deve have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
findings.description: Garanta landmarks are unique. Ajuda: landmarks deve have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
findings.recommendation: Associe rótulos explícitos a todos os campos de formulário.

findings.title: Todo o conteudo da pagina deve estar contido em landmarks.
findings.description: Garanta all pagina conteudo is contained by landmarks. Ajuda: Todo o conteudo da pagina deve estar contido em landmarks.
findings.recommendation: Revise o item com base no critério WCAG/eMAG correspondente e aplique correção no HTML/ARIA.

findings.title: Erro de validação estrutural
